ai_rationale: Bare X/Twitter URL with no notes, no due date, captured into the 'Test' list — classifying as a bookmark note since there is no verb or success criterion. Parent project cannot be inferred without knowing the tweet's content.

questions.q: What is this tweet about, and which project (if any) does it relate to — LocalShout, Jimbo/Hermes, or just personal reading?
questions.why: Title is a bare X.com URL with no notes; can't infer parent project or topic tags from the ID alone.

questions.q: Is this a save-for-later read, or a reference you want to act on (e.g. reply, quote, build something from it)?
questions.why: Determines whether this stays a bookmark note or should become a task/idea with a verb attached.
